scope: NT-1: Invoice cancellation - not possible to cancel invoice when paid and payment package is locked
summary: Invoice cancellation - it is not possible to cancel an invoice if it's paid and the payment package is locked
description_repro: 1. Generate invoice 2. Pay the invoice 3. Lock the payment package for this payment 4. Create invoice cancellation. Actual: 'Payment package not found with with id 1100 and lock status in UNLOCKED'. Expected: It must be possible to cancel the invoice.
entry_points: InvoiceCancellationService.processDebitNoteInvoice (calls paymentService.cancel for each payment linked to liability)

upstream.name: PaymentService
upstream.usage: cancel() enforces payment package UNLOCKED; findPaymentPackageByIdAndLockStatusIn(..., List.of(UNLOCKED))

upstream.name: PaymentPackageRepository.findPaymentPackageByIdAndLockStatusIn
upstream.usage: Returns package only if lock status is UNLOCKED; LOCKED package causes DomainEntityNotFoundException

upstream.name: payment_package (lock_status)
upstream.usage: Payment package lock status (UNLOCKED/LOCKED) blocks cancel when LOCKED

upstream.name: customer_liability, customer_receivable_transactions
upstream.usage: Invoice cancellation finds payments via liability offsetting (APO); then calls paymentService.cancel

upstream.name: Payment cancel API
upstream.usage: Exposed endpoint that calls PaymentService.cancel; same UNLOCKED check

upstream.name: PaymentPackageLockStatus
upstream.usage: Enum UNLOCKED/LOCKED; business rule: cancel allowed only when UNLOCKED

downstream.name: Invoice cancellation screen (Billing > Invoice Cancellation)
downstream.usage: User creates cancellation; process triggers payment cancels for paid invoices

downstream.name: InvoiceCancellationService.processDebitNoteInvoice
downstream.usage: For each liability with payments (APO), calls paymentService.cancel; fails if package locked

downstream.name: POST /payment/cancel consumers
downstream.usage: Any client calling payment cancel when package is locked gets same error

downstream.name: Invoice cancellation process (batch)
downstream.usage: Process job runs cancellation; fails on step that cancels payments when package is locked

integration_points: Invoice cancellation create (POST /invoice-cancellation) -> Process -> Process debit note invoices -> For each liability with payment offsetting (APO) -> PaymentService.cancel
POST /payment/cancel with payment_id -> PaymentService.cancel -> findPaymentPackageByIdAndLockStatusIn(UNLOCKED) -> fail if LOCKED
Payment package lock status lifecycle: create (UNLOCKED) -> lock (e.g. after LPF) -> cancel requires UNLOCKED

Regression: when package is UNLOCKED, payment cancel must succeed; when LOCKED, current behaviour throws (NT-1: allow cancel when LOCKED for invoice cancellation flow or keep restriction and document)

what_could_break.reason: If payment package is locked, cancel throws; entire cancellation fails for that invoice

what_could_break.location: POST /payment/cancel or any caller of PaymentService.cancel
what_could_break.reason: Same UNLOCKED check; LOCKED package returns 404/DomainEntityNotFoundException
Uses same processDebitNoteInvoice path; same failure when payments have locked package

what_could_break.location: Confluence: After LPF for the day for collection channel the payment package should be locked
what_could_break.reason: Locking prevents payment cancel; invoice cancellation then fails for those payments
Any change to cancel() (e.g. allowing LOCKED) affects all callers; reversal logic must stay consistent

technical_details: Merge history: No git commit or branch explicitly mentions 'NT-1' in phoenix-core-lib. Related branches/commits: feature/invoice-cancellation-changes (merged into dev multiple times); commits 'Refactor services and update payment package query logic' (445afd508) touched PaymentPackageRepository; 'payment package change depend on online payment' and feature/OnlinePaymentEditRestricted. Key code: phoenix-core-lib PaymentService.cancel() lines 903-907: paymentPackageRepository.findPaymentPackageByIdAndLockStatusIn(payment.getPaymentPackageId(), List.of(PaymentPackageLockStatus.UNLOCKED)) or else throw DomainEntityNotFoundException (message: 'Payment package not found with with id %s and lock status in UNLOCKED'). InvoiceCancellationService.processDebitNoteInvoice (lines 375-384) finds payments linked to liability via APO and calls paymentService.cancel(offsetting.getSourceId()). No conditional sync performed: no merge found specifically for NT-1 on dev/dev2.

confluence_sources.title: Payment package Create
confluence_sources.relevance: Unlocked/Locked; after LPF for day for collection channel payment package should be locked

confluence_sources.relevance: Invoice cancellation process in Billing > Invoice Cancelation

confluence_sources.title: Phase 2 - Payment package Create (2)

code_references.issue: findPaymentPackageByIdAndLockStatusIn(..., UNLOCKED) only; LOCKED package causes exception
Calls paymentService.cancel for each APO payment; no handling for locked package
startCancellationProcessing drives process that eventually calls processDebitNoteInvoice

impact_risk: High for invoice cancellation when invoice is paid and payment package is locked: process fails with clear error. Fix would likely involve either (a) allowing cancel when package is LOCKED in certain context (e.g. invoice cancellation) or (b) unlocking package as part of cancellation flow; both have downstream impact on payment cancel API and LPF/lock semantics.
